swd.screen.config.title: Simple Worlde Downloader Configuration
swd.tooltip.save_world_to.1: Decree the title of the preserved realm.
swd.tooltip.save_world_to.2: If a realm thus named doth already lie,
swd.tooltip.save_world_to.3: the new lands shall banish the old.
swd.tooltip.auto_download.1: Decree whether realms ought be fetched
swd.tooltip.auto_download.2: upon thine entrance to the fellowship.
swd.tooltip.include_entities.1: Decree whether beasts and men be preserved
swd.tooltip.include_player_data.1: Decree whether thine own effects be preserved
swd.tooltip.include_resource_packs.2: ought be preserved with thy fetched realm.
swd.status.resume_saving: > Hark! The preservation of fragments doth resume...
swd.status.queue_full: > The scroll is full! I couldst not scribe &s
swd.status.itemframe_saved: > The tapestry within the frame is secured.
swd.tooltip.resume_downloads.1: Decree if the labor shouldst be taken up anew
swd.tooltip.resume_downloads.2: should another chronicle of this world be found.
